expected_criteria: Benchmark plan reviewer rejects the seeded handoff because the bridge package hides an unjustified benchmark-side alignment DOF inside an otherwise passive gap-crossing plan.

task: Review the seeded benchmark planner handoff for the central-forbid-route ball transfer variant with a narrowed downstream pinch.
